steps.title: Read the explanation after the colon
steps.content: The colon explains that factors driving clustering in one industry may not be especially relevant in another. The blank must describe factors that differ depending on the industry.

steps.title: Match the industry difference
steps.content: A would mean the factors are not known, but the passage says they differ. C suggests narrow focus, and D means striking or admirable, neither of which fits. The answer is B.
